title: Legacy Titles
description: A collection of title screen logos for Legacy4J, in the style of, or extracted from Legacy Console Edition.
body:
![The Legacy Titles Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f1d953417d13f34e662550666797a1123473a613.png)

<sub>(formerly "Deck Title for Legacy4J")</sub>
# About
Legacy Titles is a resource pack made specifically for Legacy4J, adding the different "Edition" titles from Minecraft: Legacy Console Edition, while also adding fitting, custom titles to complete the Legacy experience for your preferred platform.

## To Apply
This resource pack requires the [Legacy4J](https://modrinth.com/mod/legacy4j) mod and its dependencies.
With L4J installed and resource pack applied, simply head to `Help & Options > Settings > Game Options > Show Advanced Options (typically done with Y on Xbox gamepads, O on keyboard)`

You can cycle through the different titles using the "Control Type" slider
![The animation cycles the "Control Type" slider to change the title used](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cd859cdad5b8891c3a42026ca18bff0d9d1dafec.gif)

<sub>I am not affiliated with Mojang Studios, 4J Studios or Microsoft. Most of the assets used belong to them.
